_doc: Single source of truth for atom-built 9-slice frames. Read by the Node bake (scripts/nine-slice-kit.mjs), the in-app editor (NineSliceEditor), and the catalog edit-link (AssetLibraryStudio). Add a frame here and it becomes bakeable, editable, and catalog-linked with no other code change. atoms = names in public/assets/ui/kit/atoms; variants[].out = composed PNG in public/assets/ui/kit; swap = palette name; consume = the CSS var its content drives; carve = flood navy bleed outside the rail.
